title: Screens UI
scenario: Onboarding flow screens do not match Figma design specifications
steps: Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app for the first time (or clear app data to reset onboarding).
Observe the first onboarding screen (Welcome / Get Started screen).
Tap 'Next' or swipe left to advance through each onboarding screen.
For each screen in the flow, compare the UI elements (title text, body text, illustrations, buttons, progress indicators) against the approved Figma design.
Continue until the final onboarding screen (e.g., 'Let's Go' or 'Finish' screen) is displayed.
Tap the final action button to exit onboarding and reach the Home screen.
expected: Every screen in the Onboarding flow matches the Figma design exactly — including layout, typography, colors, iconography, button styles, and spacing.
